---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
pathname = '/Volumes/rapearce/Kai/Ai32_Series/TraceAnalysis/20260314/fitted_traces.xlsx'
df <- read_excel(pathname)
```

```{r}
df_filtered = df %>% filter(df$tau1>0 & df$tau1 < 500 & df$A1 < 0 & df$`Correlation Coefficient` > 0.7 )



hist(df_filtered$tau1)
boxplot(df_filtered$tau1)
summary(df_filtered$tau1)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_filtered, aes(x=tau, y=Ra)) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method=lm)
```
